title: Renukeshwar Mahadev Temple
tagline: Renukeshwar Mahadev Temple — spiritual town of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Renukeshwar Mahadev Temple is situated in Renukoot in Sonbhadra district, Uttar Pradesh.
overview.description: Renukeshwar Mahadev Temple is situated in Renukoot in Sonbhadra district, Uttar Pradesh. It is located adjoining the Rihand River which is also called Renu River, from where this temple got its name. The temple is dedicated to Mahadev or Lord Shiva. The temple was built by Birla Group in the year 1972.

topPlaces.name: Renukoot
topPlaces.description: Renukoot is a town and a nagar panchayat in Sonbhadra district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is 68 km south from the district headquarters Robertsganj.

topPlaces.name: Rihand Dam
topPlaces.description: Rihand Dam, also known as Govind Ballabh Pant Sagar, is the second-largest dam in India by volume (storage), behind only Indirasagar Dam of Madhya Pradesh. The reservoir of Rihand Dam, called Govind Ballabh Pant Sagar, is India's largest manmade lake.

topPlaces.name: Pipri
topPlaces.description: Pipri is a town and a nagar panchayat in Sonbhadra district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

items.note: Renukoot is a town and a nagar panchayat in Sonbhadra district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is 68 km south from the district headquarters Robertsganj.

Rihand Dam, also known as Govind Ballabh Pant Sagar, is the second-largest dam in India by volume (storage), behind only Indirasagar Dam of Madhya Pradesh. The reservoir of Rihand Dam, called Govind Ballabh Pant Sagar, is India's largest manmade lake.
Pipri is a town and a nagar panchayat in Sonbhadra district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Renukeshwar Mahadev Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Renukeshwar Mahadev Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Renukeshwar Mahadev Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lal Bahadur Shastri Airport, Varanasi (139 km) and the nearest railway station is Varanasi Junction (124 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Renukeshwar Mahadev Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Renukeshwar Mahadev Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Renukeshwar Mahadev Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Renukeshwar Mahadev Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Renukeshwar Mahadev Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Renukoot, Rihand Dam, Pipri.
